title: aquilegia sulphurea
intro: Aquilegia sulphurea, also known as the golden columbine, is a species of flowering plant in the buttercup family that is native to the western United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Aquilegia sulphurea include its ability to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
